languages.text: "Я полагала, что глухая оборона во внутреннем дворце будет хорошей идеей, но... Нам стоит выслушать остальных, Ваша Светлость. Мое решение не подойдет". {n}Лария с усилием {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}выдавливает из себя слова{/d}, не сводя с вас взгляд. В нем читается целая гамма эмоций: презрение к себе, стыд, отчаяние... надежда.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я полагала, что глухая оборона во внутреннем дворце будет хорошей идеей, но... Нам стоит выслушать остальных, Ваша Светлость. Мое решение не подойдет". {n}Лария с усилием выдавливает из себя слова, не сводя с вас взгляд. В нем читается целая гамма эмоций: презрение к себе, стыд, отчаяние... надежда.{/n}
traits.speaker: LariaVoigtvir

languages.text: "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}forces the words out{/d}, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}

Мое решение не подойдет". {n}Лария с усилием {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}выдавливает из себя слова{/d}, не сводя с вас взгляд. "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria forces the words out, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}

languages.text: “我原以为在内殿固守是最佳方案，但是……我们还是应当听听其他人的意见，大人。我的方案并不妥当。”{n}菈丽雅{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}勉强挤出这些话{/d}，目光始终没有从你身上移开。她的眼中闪过自责、羞愧、绝望……以及一丝希望。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}forces the words out{/d}, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我原以为在内殿固守是最佳方案，但是……我们还是应当听听其他人的意见，大人。我的方案并不妥当。”{n}菈丽雅{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}勉强挤出这些话{/d}，目光始终没有从你身上移开。她的眼中闪过自责、羞愧、绝望……以及一丝希望。{/n}

languages.text: « J'ai d'abord cru qu'il valait mieux nous retrancher ici, au cœur du palais, mais... Nous devrions écouter les autres, Votre Seigneurie. Mon approche n'est pas la bonne. » {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}Les mots sortent avec difficulté{/d} de la bouche de Laria, qui vous fixe du regard. Vous voyez défiler toutes les émotions possibles dans ses yeux : le mépris d'elle-même, la honte, le désespoir... l'espoir.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}forces the words out{/d}, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'ai d'abord cru qu'il valait mieux nous retrancher ici, au cœur du palais, mais... Nous devrions écouter les autres, Votre Seigneurie. Mon approche n'est pas la bonne. » {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}Les mots sortent avec difficulté{/d} de la bouche de Laria, qui vous fixe du regard. Vous voyez défiler toutes les émotions possibles dans ses yeux : le mépris d'elle-même, la honte, le désespoir... l'espoir.{/n}

languages.text: «Pensaba que atrincherarnos en el palacio interior sería la mejor opción, pero... deberíamos escuchar a los demás, milord. Mi enfoque no es adecuado». {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}se obliga a hablar{/d}, sin apartar la mirada de ti. Observas en sus ojos toda clase de emociones. Desprecio hacia sí misma, vergüenza, desesperación... y esperanza.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}forces the words out{/d}, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}

Mi enfoque no es adecuado». {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}se obliga a hablar{/d}, sin apartar la mirada de ti. Observas en sus ojos toda clase de emociones. Desprecio hacia sí misma, vergüenza, desesperación... y esperanza.{/n}

languages.text: "Burada, iç sarayda mevzilenmenin en iyi hareket planı olacağını düşünmüştüm ama... Diğerlerini dinlemeliyiz Lord Hazretleri. Benim yaklaşımım uygun değil." {n}Gözlerini senden ayırmayan Laria, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}kelimeleri zorla ağzından çıkarıyor{/d}. Gözlerinde bir dizi duygu gözlemliyorsun: Kendini hor görme, utanç, çaresizlik... Umut.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}forces the words out{/d}, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Burada, iç sarayda mevzilenmenin en iyi hareket planı olacağını düşünmüştüm ama... Diğerlerini dinlemeliyiz Lord Hazretleri. Benim yaklaşımım uygun değil." {n}Gözlerini senden ayırmayan Laria, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}kelimeleri zorla ağzından çıkarıyor{/d}. Gözlerinde bir dizi duygu gözlemliyorsun: Kendini hor görme, utanç, çaresizlik... Umut.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich dachte, uns hier im inneren Palast zu verschanzen, wäre die beste Lösung, aber ... Wir sollten auch die anderen anhören, Eure Lordschaft. Mein Ansatz ist ungeeignet." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}presst die Worte heraus{/d}, ohne den Blick von dir abzuwenden. Du erkennst verschiedene Emotionen in ihren Augen: Selbstverachtung, Scham, Verzweiflung ... Hoffnung.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}forces the words out{/d}, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}

Du erkennst verschiedene Emotionen in ihren Augen: Selbstverachtung, Scham, Verzweiflung ... Hoffnung.{/n}

languages.text: 「ここ、内宮に籠もるのが最善策だとばかり思っていたが…他者の意見も聞くべきだ、殿。私の考えは不向きだ」{n}ラリア{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}は、あなたを見つめながら、言葉を吐き出す{/d}。彼女の瞳には、自責、恥、絶望…そして希望が映り込む。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought entrenching ourselves here in the inner palace would be the best course of action, but... We should listen to the others, Your Lordship. My approach is not suitable." {n}Laria {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}forces the words out{/d}, not looking away from you. You observe a gamut of emotions in her eyes: self-contempt, shame, despair... hope.{/n}
